body.title: unified costs log — all inference spend to costs.log
body.result: Added append-only costs.log at ~/.TheIgors/logs/costs.log (format: ts|inference|provider|model|tier|cost_usd|tokens_in|tokens_out|caller). _append() helper added to forensic_logger.py; log_reasoning_call() now appends a cost entry when cost_usd > 0. query_costs_log(window_days) added to budget.py with inference_costs_log tool — breaks down spend by tier/provider/model. All 1684 tests pass.
body.description: Append-only costs.log at ~/.TheIgors/logs/costs.log. Format: ts|source|provider|model|tier|cost_usd|tokens_in|tokens_out|caller. Hook into: OpenRouterReasoner (after every reasoning call), inner_cc/_make_or_request (per call), AnthropicReasoner (if ever re-enabled). Add daily/weekly total query to budget.py. Feeds priority decisions: which calls cost most, which tiers burn fastest.
